API docs by Redocly

Causal AI MVP API (1.27.1)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Generated from Terraform routes and Pydantic models in scripts/openapi_models.py.

Python SDK documentation

Flow: LiNGAM

Session flow: KG init (session bootstrap) -> CD upload -> LiNGAM run -> status/result.

Initialize knowledge graph session

Create a new KG session UUID. This UUID is reused by KG and CD endpoints to keep data and tasks in the same tenant/session scope.

Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/kg/init

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uuid": "string",
  • "status": "ok"
}

Create CD upload URL

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading CD input data before calling algorithm run endpoints such as /cd/lingam/run/{uuid}, /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}, or /cd/multica/run/{uuid}.

Supported upload content types:

  • application/json (canonical dataset payload)
  • text/csv (single dataset CSV; for trackr/lingam)
  • application/zip (MultiCa: one or more .csv files in a ZIP) Note: MultiCa accepts JSON or ZIP input; non-JSON MultiCa input must be ZIP.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/cd/upload-url/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 900,
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "upload_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-upload-url",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Run LayeredLiNGAM (session-scoped)

Queue a LayeredLiNGAM run using uploaded CD input data in the same session (session is initialized by /kg/init). This endpoint does not require matching or transferred_knowledge.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
task_id
required
string (Task Id)

CD upload task id returned by /cd/upload-url/{uuid}.

s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Threshold (number) or Threshold (null) (Threshold)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/lingam/run/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "params": {
    • "delta": 2,
    • "gamma": 1
    },
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "threshold": 0.01
}

Get CD task status

Query asynchronous CD task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/status/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": null,
  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Get CD task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final CD result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): CD task id.
  • mode (string): one of "lingam", "trackr", "multica".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Common CD payload fields:

  • feature_names (string[]): ordered feature names used by causal discovery.
  • adjacency_matrices (number[][]): discovered causal adjacency matrix in industry orientation cause=row, effect=col.
    • adjacency_matrices[i][j] != 0 means feature feature_names[i] causes feature feature_names[j].
  • num_datasets (number): number of datasets used in fitting.
  • num_variables (number): number of variables/features in result.
  • training_data.columns (string[]): one-hot/processed training column order.
  • training_data.data (number[][]): processed training rows aligned to columns.
  • feature_metadata.feature_types (object): variable type map (e.g., numeric/categorical).
  • feature_metadata.feature_categories (object): category mapping for one-hot groups.

Mode-specific fields:

  • trackr: includes kg_id and matching_used.
  • multica: includes matching_used.
  • lingam: does not include kg_id / matching_used.

Cross-service note:

  • Knowledge Graph uploads also use cause=row, effect=col.
  • Decision Analysis converts this internally to Cation's effect=row, cause=col representation at DA ingest.

Which example to use by flow:

  • If your flow is LiNGAM (/cd/lingam/run/{uuid}), use the lingam example.
  • If your flow is TraCKR (/cd/trackr/match -> /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}), use the trackr example.
  • If your flow is MultiCa (/cd/multica/match -> /cd/multica/run/{uuid}), use the multica example.

Example (lingam mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "lingam",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.3, 0.0],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.5],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (trackr mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "trackr",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.2, 0.0],
    [0.1, 0.0, 0.4],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "kg_id": "<kg_id>",
  "matching_used": "matching/trackr/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (multica mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "multica",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.15, 0.10],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.45],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 3,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "matching_used": "matching/multica/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
    "data": [[1.0, 1200.0, 0.3], [0.0, 1500.0, 0.4]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "region=APAC": "one_hot",
      "budget": "numeric",
      "conversion": "numeric"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "region": ["region=APAC"]
    }
  }
}
path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/result/{uuid}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403

  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Flow: TraCKR + KG

Cross-service flow: KG init/upload/add -> TraCKR match/set/run -> status/result.

Initialize knowledge graph session

Create a new KG session UUID. This UUID is reused by KG and CD endpoints to keep data and tasks in the same tenant/session scope.

Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/kg/init

  • "status": "ok"

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading KG source data before calling /kg/add/{uuid}.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
Filename (string) or Filename (null) (Filename)
Default: null
Expires In (integer) or Expires In (null) (Expires In)
Default: 900

Responses

/kg/upload-url/{uuid}

}

Register KG metadata and get kg_id

Register an uploaded KG file in the current session and return kg_id. The returned kg_id is used by TraCKR endpoints via source_kg_id or transferred_knowledge.kg_id.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
required
string (Title) non-empty
columns
required
Array of strings (Columns) non-empty
s3_key
required
string (S3 Key) non-empty
Row Count (integer) or Row Count (null) (Row Count)
Default: null
Size Bytes (integer) or Size Bytes (null) (Size Bytes)
Default: null

Responses

/kg/add/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "columns": [
    • "X1",
    • "X2",
    • "X3",
    • "X4",
    • "state"
    ],
  • "row_count": 5,
  • "s3_key": "kg/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/3f9e9b95-source_graph.csv",
  • "size_bytes": 142,
  • "title": "Source Domain Knowledge Graph"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uuid": "string",
  • "status": "ok",
  • "kg_id": "string"
}

Create CD upload URL

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading CD input data before calling algorithm run endpoints such as /cd/lingam/run/{uuid}, /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}, or /cd/multica/run/{uuid}.

Supported upload content types:

  • application/json (canonical dataset payload)
  • text/csv (single dataset CSV; for trackr/lingam)
  • application/zip (MultiCa: one or more .csv files in a ZIP) Note: MultiCa accepts JSON or ZIP input; non-JSON MultiCa input must be ZIP.

Start TraCKR matching (depends on KG)

Start column matching between uploaded target data and a source KG. Requires source_kg_id from /kg/add/{uuid} in the same session.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
target_s3_key
required
string (Target S3 Key)
source_kg_id
required
string (Source Kg Id)
Target Metadata (object) or Target Metadata (null) (Target Metadata)
Default: null
Source Metadata (object) or Source Metadata (null) (Source Metadata)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/trackr/match/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "params": {
    • "gamma": 0.5,
    • "q_threshold": 0,
    • "top_n": 3
    },
  • "source_kg_id": "d3024e1c-ffdd-4e63-9e02-6d1e3ad53b17",
  • "source_metadata": {
    • "AGE": "Age in source knowledge graph",
    • "BODY_MASS_INDEX": "BMI in source knowledge graph",
    • "RISK_SCORE": "Risk score in source knowledge graph"
    },
  • "target_metadata": {
    • "Age": "Customer age in years",
    • "BMI": "Body mass index",
    • "RiskScore": "Predicted risk score"
    },
  • "target_s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input"
}

  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "message": "Matching computation started",
  • "status": "pending"
}

Confirm TraCKR matching mapping

Persist or update target->source column mapping for TraCKR before run.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (Matching) non-empty

Target->source mapping for TraCKR. Many-to-one is allowed (multiple target columns may map to the same source column).

Matching Task Id (string) or Matching Task Id (null) (Matching Task Id)
Default: null
Array of Target Columns (strings) or Target Columns (null) (Target Columns)
Default: null
Array of Source Columns (strings) or Source Columns (null) (Source Columns)
Default: null
Source Kg Id (string) or Source Kg Id (null) (Source Kg Id)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/trackr/match/{uuid}/set

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "matching": {
    • "Age": "AGE",
    • "BMI": "BODY_MASS_INDEX",
    • "RiskScore": "RISK_SCORE"
    },
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "source_columns": [
    • "AGE",
    • "BODY_MASS_INDEX",
    • "RISK_SCORE"
    ],
  • "source_kg_id": "d3024e1c-ffdd-4e63-9e02-6d1e3ad53b17",
  • "target_columns": [
    • "Age",
    • "BMI",
    • "RiskScore"
    ]
}

    },
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "status": "updated"
}

Run TraCKR with transferred KG knowledge

Queue a TraCKR run. transferred_knowledge.kg_id must come from /kg/add/{uuid}, and transferred_knowledge.session_uuid must equal path {uuid}.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
task_id
required
string (Task Id)

CD upload task id returned by /cd/upload-url/{uuid}.

s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Threshold (number) or Threshold (null) (Threshold)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null
required
object (CDTransferredKnowledgeReference)

Reference to transferred knowledge source in same session.

matching_task_id
required
string (Matching Task Id)

Responses

/cd/trackr/run/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "params": {
    • "max_iter": 200
    },
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "threshold": 0.01,
  • "transferred_knowledge": {
    • "kg_id": "d3024e1c-ffdd-4e63-9e02-6d1e3ad53b17",
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
    }
}

  • "status": "queued",

  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Get CD task status

Query asynchronous CD task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/status/{uuid}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{

  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",

}

Get CD task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final CD result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): CD task id.
  • mode (string): one of "lingam", "trackr", "multica".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Common CD payload fields:

  • feature_names (string[]): ordered feature names used by causal discovery.
  • adjacency_matrices (number[][]): discovered causal adjacency matrix in industry orientation cause=row, effect=col.
    • adjacency_matrices[i][j] != 0 means feature feature_names[i] causes feature feature_names[j].
  • num_datasets (number): number of datasets used in fitting.
  • num_variables (number): number of variables/features in result.
  • training_data.columns (string[]): one-hot/processed training column order.
  • training_data.data (number[][]): processed training rows aligned to columns.
  • feature_metadata.feature_types (object): variable type map (e.g., numeric/categorical).
  • feature_metadata.feature_categories (object): category mapping for one-hot groups.

Mode-specific fields:

  • trackr: includes kg_id and matching_used.
  • multica: includes matching_used.
  • lingam: does not include kg_id / matching_used.

Cross-service note:

  • Knowledge Graph uploads also use cause=row, effect=col.
  • Decision Analysis converts this internally to Cation's effect=row, cause=col representation at DA ingest.

Which example to use by flow:

  • If your flow is LiNGAM (/cd/lingam/run/{uuid}), use the lingam example.
  • If your flow is TraCKR (/cd/trackr/match -> /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}), use the trackr example.
  • If your flow is MultiCa (/cd/multica/match -> /cd/multica/run/{uuid}), use the multica example.

Example (lingam mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "lingam",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.3, 0.0],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.5],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (trackr mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "trackr",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.2, 0.0],
    [0.1, 0.0, 0.4],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "kg_id": "<kg_id>",
  "matching_used": "matching/trackr/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (multica mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "multica",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.15, 0.10],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.45],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 3,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "matching_used": "matching/multica/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
    "data": [[1.0, 1200.0, 0.3], [0.0, 1500.0, 0.4]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "region=APAC": "one_hot",
      "budget": "numeric",
      "conversion": "numeric"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "region": ["region=APAC"]
    }
  }
}
path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/result/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Flow: MultiCa

Session flow: KG init (session bootstrap) -> CD upload -> MultiCa match/set/run -> status/result.

Initialize knowledge graph session

Create a new KG session UUID. This UUID is reused by KG and CD endpoints to keep data and tasks in the same tenant/session scope.

Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/kg/init

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uuid": "string",
  • "status": "ok"
}

Create CD upload URL

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading CD input data before calling algorithm run endpoints such as /cd/lingam/run/{uuid}, /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}, or /cd/multica/run/{uuid}.

Supported upload content types:

  • application/json (canonical dataset payload)
  • text/csv (single dataset CSV; for trackr/lingam)
  • application/zip (MultiCa: one or more .csv files in a ZIP) Note: MultiCa accepts JSON or ZIP input; non-JSON MultiCa input must be ZIP.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/cd/upload-url/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 900,
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "upload_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-upload-url",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Start MultiCa matching

Start automatic column matching for MultiCa using uploaded data only (no KG dependency).

Input formats:

  • JSON: {"data": [dataset1, dataset2, ...]}
  • ZIP: each .csv member is parsed as one dataset, in ZIP member order. If metadata is provided, metadata length must match dataset count.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Array of Metadata (objects) or Metadata (null) (Metadata)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/multica/match/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "metadata": [
    • {
      • "Age": "years",
      • "BMI": "kg/m2",
      • "dataset": "hospital_a"
      },
    • {
      • "AgeYears": "years",
      • "BodyMassIndex": "kg/m2",
      • "dataset": "hospital_b"
      }
    ],
  • "params": {
    • "gamma": 1,
    • "q_threshold": 0,
    • "top_n": 3
    },
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input"
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "message": "Matching computation started",
  • "status": "pending"
}

Confirm MultiCa matching mapping

Persist or update column mapping used by MultiCa run.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (Matching) non-empty
Matching Task Id (string) or Matching Task Id (null) (Matching Task Id)
Default: null
Array of Datasets Columns (strings) or Datasets Columns (null) (Datasets Columns)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/multica/match/{uuid}/set

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "datasets_columns": [
    • [
      • "Age",
      • "BMI",
      • "RiskScore"
      ],
    • [
      • "AgeYears",
      • "BodyMassIndex",
      • "RiskScore"
      ]
    ],
  • "matching": {
    • "Age": "AgeYears",
    • "BMI": "BodyMassIndex",
    • "RiskScore": "RiskScore"
    },

}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "current_matched": {
    • "Age": "AGE",
    • "BMI": "BODY_MASS_INDEX",
    • "RiskScore": "RISK_SCORE"
    },
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "status": "updated"
}

Run MultiCa (session-scoped)

Queue a MultiCa run using uploaded CD input data in the same session (session is initialized by /kg/init). This endpoint does not accept transferred_knowledge.

Input formats:

  • JSON: {"data": [dataset1, dataset2, ...]}
  • ZIP: each .csv member is parsed as one dataset, in ZIP member order. Note: MultiCa requires at least 2 datasets.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
task_id
required
string (Task Id)

CD upload task id returned by /cd/upload-url/{uuid}.

s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Threshold (number) or Threshold (null) (Threshold)
Default: null
Array of Roots (strings) or Roots (null) (Roots)
Default: null
Array of Sinks (strings) or Sinks (null) (Sinks)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null
matching_task_id
required
string (Matching Task Id)

Responses

/cd/multica/run/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "params": {
    • "max_iter": 200
    },
  • "roots": [
    • "Age"
    ],
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "sinks": [
    • "RiskScore"
    ],
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "threshold": 0.01
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "queued",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Get CD task status

Query asynchronous CD task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/status/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": null,
  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Get CD task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final CD result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): CD task id.
  • mode (string): one of "lingam", "trackr", "multica".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Common CD payload fields:

  • feature_names (string[]): ordered feature names used by causal discovery.
  • adjacency_matrices (number[][]): discovered causal adjacency matrix in industry orientation cause=row, effect=col.
    • adjacency_matrices[i][j] != 0 means feature feature_names[i] causes feature feature_names[j].
  • num_datasets (number): number of datasets used in fitting.
  • num_variables (number): number of variables/features in result.
  • training_data.columns (string[]): one-hot/processed training column order.
  • training_data.data (number[][]): processed training rows aligned to columns.
  • feature_metadata.feature_types (object): variable type map (e.g., numeric/categorical).
  • feature_metadata.feature_categories (object): category mapping for one-hot groups.

Mode-specific fields:

  • trackr: includes kg_id and matching_used.
  • multica: includes matching_used.
  • lingam: does not include kg_id / matching_used.

Cross-service note:

  • Knowledge Graph uploads also use cause=row, effect=col.
  • Decision Analysis converts this internally to Cation's effect=row, cause=col representation at DA ingest.

Which example to use by flow:

  • If your flow is LiNGAM (/cd/lingam/run/{uuid}), use the lingam example.
  • If your flow is TraCKR (/cd/trackr/match -> /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}), use the trackr example.
  • If your flow is MultiCa (/cd/multica/match -> /cd/multica/run/{uuid}), use the multica example.

Example (lingam mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "lingam",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.3, 0.0],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.5],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (trackr mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "trackr",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.2, 0.0],
    [0.1, 0.0, 0.4],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "kg_id": "<kg_id>",
  "matching_used": "matching/trackr/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (multica mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "multica",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.15, 0.10],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.45],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 3,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "matching_used": "matching/multica/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
    "data": [[1.0, 1200.0, 0.3], [0.0, 1500.0, 0.4]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "region=APAC": "one_hot",
      "budget": "numeric",
      "conversion": "numeric"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "region": ["region=APAC"]
    }
  }
}
path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/result/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Flow: CD + DA

Decision analysis flow continues from causal discovery results: KG init -> CD upload -> CD run (LiNGAM/TraCKR/MultiCa) -> CD result -> DA explain/enumerate -> DA status/result.

Start decision analysis explanation

Queue a DA explain task using CD result reference (cd_result_reference.session_uuid + task_id). Typical usage is LiNGAM/CD completion followed by DA explain.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (CDResultReference)

Reference to a CD task result (session + task).

required
object (Current Observation) non-empty
required
Array of objects (Targets) non-empty
DAConstraints (object) or null
Default: null
Array of Feature Penalties (strings) or Feature Penalties (null) (Feature Penalties)
Default: null
DAParams (object) or null
Default: null

Responses

/da/explain/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cd_result_reference": {
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be",
    • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c"
    },
  • "constraints": {
    • "decrease_only": [
      • "debt"
      ],
    • "immutable": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "immutable_effect": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "increase_only": [
      • "education"
      ]
    },
  • "current_observation": {
    • "age": 0.45,
    • "debt": 0.4,
    • "education": 0.6
    },
  • "params": {
    • "alpha": 1,
    • "lagrange_multiplier": 0,
    • "time_limit": 60
    },
  • "targets": [
    • {
      • "col": "debt",
      • "sense": ">",
      • "threshold": 0.8
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "queued",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Start decision analysis enumeration

Queue a DA enumerate task using CD result reference. Use this when you need multiple candidate actions/options.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (CDResultReference)

Reference to a CD task result (session + task).

required
object (Current Observation) non-empty
required
Array of objects (Targets) non-empty
DAConstraints (object) or null
Default: null
Array of Feature Penalties (strings) or Feature Penalties (null) (Feature Penalties)
Default: null
DAParams (object) or null
Default: null

Responses

/da/enumerate/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cd_result_reference": {
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be",
    • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c"
    },

    • "decrease_only": [
      • "debt"
      ],
    • "immutable": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "immutable_effect": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "increase_only": [
      • "education"
      ]
    },

    • "age": 0.45,
    • "debt": 0.4,
    • "education": 0.6
    },

    • "alpha": 1,
    • "lagrange_multiplier": 0,
    • "time_limit": 60
    },

    • {
      • "col": "debt",
      • "sense": ">",
      • "threshold": 0.8
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "queued",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"

Get DA task status

Query asynchronous DA task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/da/status/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": null,
  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Get DA task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final DA result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): DA task id.
  • mode (string): "explain" or "enumerate".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Mode-specific payload:

  • mode="explain": response has result (object).
  • mode="enumerate": response has results (array of explain-like objects).

Explain result object (full fields):

  • is_solved (boolean): whether thresholds are satisfied by a found action.
  • z (number[]): current full feature vector.
  • x (number[]): current actionable-feature sub-vector.
  • y (number[]): current target values.
  • threshold (number[]): requested target thresholds.
  • action (number[]): recommended feature deltas.
  • effect (number[][]): per-graph causal effect on all features.
  • z_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual full feature vectors.
  • x_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual actionable vectors.
  • y_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual target values.
  • cost (number): optimization cost.
  • dist (number[]): per-graph distance/penalty terms.
  • obj (number): optimization objective value.
  • support (number[]): indices of non-zero action entries.
  • support_effect (number[]): indices where causal effect exceeds tolerance.
  • time (number): solver elapsed time in seconds.

Unsolved behavior (is_solved=false):

  • action is all zeros.
  • cost is 0.0.
  • dist is all zeros.
  • obj is large (1e13, MAX_VAL).
  • z_cf repeats current z; y_cf mirrors current targets per graph.

Note for frontend:

  • In enumerate mode, results can be an empty array when no feasible non-empty action is found.

Example (explain mode, unsolved):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<da_task_id>",
  "mode": "explain",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "result": {
    "is_solved": false,
    "z": [0.5, 1.2, 2.1],
    "x": [0.5, 1.2],
    "y": [0.5],
    "threshold": [0.8],
    "action": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    "effect": [[0.0, 0.0, 0.0]],
    "z_cf": [[0.5, 1.2, 2.1]],
    "x_cf": [[0.5, 1.2]],
    "y_cf": [[0.5]],
    "cost": 0.0,
    "dist": [0.0],
    "obj": 10000000000000.0,
    "support": [],
    "support_effect": [],
    "time": 0.0021
  }
}

Example (enumerate mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<da_task_id>",
  "mode": "enumerate",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "results": [
    {
      "is_solved": true,
      "z": [0.5, 1.2, 2.1],
      "x": [0.5, 1.2],
      "y": [0.5],
      "threshold": [0.8],
      "action": [0.3, 0.0, 0.1],
      "effect": [[0.02, 0.01, 0.00]],
      "z_cf": [[0.82, 1.21, 2.2]],
      "x_cf": [[0.82, 1.21]],
      "y_cf": [[0.81]],
      "cost": 0.4,
      "dist": [0.0],
      "obj": 0.4,
      "support": [0, 2],
      "support_effect": [0, 1],
      "time": 0.0049
    }
  ]
}

Schemas by mode: DAExplainArtifact, DAEnumerateArtifact.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/da/result/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

Delete DA task and artifacts

Delete DA task metadata and related artifacts by task_id in the given session.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/da/task/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "deleted",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

KG 01 Init

Initialize KG sessions

Initialize knowledge graph session

Create a new KG session UUID. This UUID is reused by KG and CD endpoints to keep data and tasks in the same tenant/session scope.

Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/kg/init

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "uuid": "string",
  • "status": "ok"
}

KG 02 Upload

Generate upload URLs for KG inputs

Create KG upload URL

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading KG source data before calling /kg/add/{uuid}.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
Filename (string) or Filename (null) (Filename)
Default: null
Expires In (integer) or Expires In (null) (Expires In)
Default: 900

Responses

/kg/upload-url/{uuid}

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 900,
  • "filename": "source_graph.csv"
}

  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500

application/json

  • "upload_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-upload-url",

}

KG 03 Add

Register KG metadata

Register KG metadata and get kg_id

Register an uploaded KG file in the current session and return kg_id. The returned kg_id is used by TraCKR endpoints via source_kg_id or transferred_knowledge.kg_id.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
title
required
string (Title) non-empty
columns
required
Array of strings (Columns) non-empty
s3_key
required
string (S3 Key) non-empty
Row Count (integer) or Row Count (null) (Row Count)
Default: null
Size Bytes (integer) or Size Bytes (null) (Size Bytes)
Default: null

Responses

/kg/add/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "columns": [
    • "X1",
    • "X2",
    • "X3",
    • "X4",
    • "state"
    ],
  • "row_count": 5,
  • "s3_key": "kg/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/3f9e9b95-source_graph.csv",
  • "size_bytes": 142,
  • "title": "Source Domain Knowledge Graph"
}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500

application/json

  • "status": "ok",
  • "kg_id": "string"
}

List KG entries in session

uuid
required
string

CD Common 01 Upload

Generate upload URLs for CD inputs

Create CD upload URL

Return a pre-signed URL for uploading CD input data before calling algorithm run endpoints such as /cd/lingam/run/{uuid}, /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}, or /cd/multica/run/{uuid}.

Supported upload content types:

  • application/json (canonical dataset payload)
  • text/csv (single dataset CSV; for trackr/lingam)
  • application/zip (MultiCa: one or more .csv files in a ZIP) Note: MultiCa accepts JSON or ZIP input; non-JSON MultiCa input must be ZIP.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
optional
object

Responses

/cd/upload-url/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{ }

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 900,
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "upload_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-upload-url",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

uuid
required
string

CD TraCKR 02 Match

Start/query TraCKR matching

Start TraCKR matching (depends on KG)

Start column matching between uploaded target data and a source KG. Requires source_kg_id from /kg/add/{uuid} in the same session.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
target_s3_key
required
string (Target S3 Key)
source_kg_id
required
string (Source Kg Id)
Target Metadata (object) or Target Metadata (null) (Target Metadata)
Default: null
Source Metadata (object) or Source Metadata (null) (Source Metadata)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null

    • "AGE": "Age in source knowledge graph",
    • "BODY_MASS_INDEX": "BMI in source knowledge graph",
    • "RISK_SCORE": "Risk score in source knowledge graph"
    },
  • "target_metadata": {
    • "Age": "Customer age in years",
    • "BMI": "Body mass index",
    • "RiskScore": "Predicted risk score"
    },
  • "target_s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input"
}

  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500

}

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

required
required
object (Matching) non-empty

Matching Task Id (string) or Matching Task Id (null) (Matching Task Id)
Default: null

Default: null

Default: null

Start TraCKR model runs

Run TraCKR with transferred KG knowledge

Queue a TraCKR run. transferred_knowledge.kg_id must come from /kg/add/{uuid}, and transferred_knowledge.session_uuid must equal path {uuid}.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
task_id
required
string (Task Id)

CD upload task id returned by /cd/upload-url/{uuid}.

s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Threshold (number) or Threshold (null) (Threshold)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null
required
object (CDTransferredKnowledgeReference)

Reference to transferred knowledge source in same session.

matching_task_id
required
string (Matching Task Id)

Responses

/cd/trackr/run/{uuid}

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

    • "max_iter": 200
    },
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",

  • "threshold": 0.01,
  • "transferred_knowledge": {
    • "kg_id": "d3024e1c-ffdd-4e63-9e02-6d1e3ad53b17",
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
    }
}

  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

CD MultiCa 02 Match

Start/query MultiCa matching

Start MultiCa matching

Start automatic column matching for MultiCa using uploaded data only (no KG dependency).

Input formats:

  • JSON: {"data": [dataset1, dataset2, ...]}
  • ZIP: each .csv member is parsed as one dataset, in ZIP member order. If metadata is provided, metadata length must match dataset count.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Array of Metadata (objects) or Metadata (null) (Metadata)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null

Responses

/cd/multica/match/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "metadata": [
    • {
      • "Age": "years",
      • "BMI": "kg/m2",
      • "dataset": "hospital_a"
      },
    • {
      • "AgeYears": "years",
      • "BodyMassIndex": "kg/m2",
      • "dataset": "hospital_b"
      }
    ],
  • "params": {
    • "gamma": 1,
    • "q_threshold": 0,
    • "top_n": 3
    },
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input"
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "matching_task_id": "380de95d-8586-4c67-814c-f0d7b4fa72fd",
  • "message": "Matching computation started",
  • "status": "pending"
}

CD MultiCa 04 Run

Start MultiCa model runs

Run MultiCa (session-scoped)

Queue a MultiCa run using uploaded CD input data in the same session (session is initialized by /kg/init). This endpoint does not accept transferred_knowledge.

Input formats:

  • JSON: {"data": [dataset1, dataset2, ...]}
  • ZIP: each .csv member is parsed as one dataset, in ZIP member order. Note: MultiCa requires at least 2 datasets.
path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
task_id
required
string (Task Id)

CD upload task id returned by /cd/upload-url/{uuid}.

s3_key
required
string (S3 Key)
Threshold (number) or Threshold (null) (Threshold)
Default: null
Array of Roots (strings) or Roots (null) (Roots)
Default: null
Array of Sinks (strings) or Sinks (null) (Sinks)
Default: null
Params (object) or Params (null) (Params)
Default: null
matching_task_id
required
string (Matching Task Id)

Responses

/cd/multica/run/{uuid}

application/json

    • "max_iter": 200
    },
  • "roots": [
    • "Age"
    ],
  • "s3_key": "cd/7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be/5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c/input",
  • "sinks": [
    • "RiskScore"
    ],

}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"

CD Common 05 Status

Check CD task status

Get CD task status

Query asynchronous CD task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/status/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": null,
  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

CD Common 06 Result

Fetch CD task results

Get CD task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final CD result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): CD task id.
  • mode (string): one of "lingam", "trackr", "multica".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Common CD payload fields:

  • feature_names (string[]): ordered feature names used by causal discovery.
  • adjacency_matrices (number[][]): discovered causal adjacency matrix in industry orientation cause=row, effect=col.
    • adjacency_matrices[i][j] != 0 means feature feature_names[i] causes feature feature_names[j].
  • num_datasets (number): number of datasets used in fitting.
  • num_variables (number): number of variables/features in result.
  • training_data.columns (string[]): one-hot/processed training column order.
  • training_data.data (number[][]): processed training rows aligned to columns.
  • feature_metadata.feature_types (object): variable type map (e.g., numeric/categorical).
  • feature_metadata.feature_categories (object): category mapping for one-hot groups.

Mode-specific fields:

  • trackr: includes kg_id and matching_used.
  • multica: includes matching_used.
  • lingam: does not include kg_id / matching_used.

Cross-service note:

  • Knowledge Graph uploads also use cause=row, effect=col.
  • Decision Analysis converts this internally to Cation's effect=row, cause=col representation at DA ingest.

Which example to use by flow:

  • If your flow is LiNGAM (/cd/lingam/run/{uuid}), use the lingam example.
  • If your flow is TraCKR (/cd/trackr/match -> /cd/trackr/run/{uuid}), use the trackr example.
  • If your flow is MultiCa (/cd/multica/match -> /cd/multica/run/{uuid}), use the multica example.

Example (lingam mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "lingam",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.3, 0.0],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.5],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (trackr mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "trackr",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.2, 0.0],
    [0.1, 0.0, 0.4],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 1,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "kg_id": "<kg_id>",
  "matching_used": "matching/trackr/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["age", "income", "status=active"],
    "data": [[30.0, 60000.0, 1.0], [42.0, 85000.0, 0.0]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "age": "numeric",
      "income": "numeric",
      "status=active": "one_hot"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "status": ["status=active"]
    }
  }
}

Example (multica mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<cd_task_id>",
  "mode": "multica",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "feature_names": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
  "adjacency_matrices": [
    [0.0, 0.15, 0.10],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.45],
    [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]
  ],
  "num_datasets": 3,
  "num_variables": 3,
  "matching_used": "matching/multica/<session_uuid>/state.json",
  "training_data": {
    "columns": ["region=APAC", "budget", "conversion"],
    "data": [[1.0, 1200.0, 0.3], [0.0, 1500.0, 0.4]]
  },
  "feature_metadata": {
    "feature_types": {
      "region=APAC": "one_hot",
      "budget": "numeric",
      "conversion": "numeric"
    },
    "feature_categories": {
      "region": ["region=APAC"]
    }
  }
}
path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/cd/result/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

CD Common 99 Other

Other shared Causal Discovery APIs

DA 01 Explain

Submit DA explain tasks from CD results

Start decision analysis explanation

Queue a DA explain task using CD result reference (cd_result_reference.session_uuid + task_id). Typical usage is LiNGAM/CD completion followed by DA explain.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (CDResultReference)

Reference to a CD task result (session + task).

required
object (Current Observation) non-empty
required
Array of objects (Targets) non-empty
DAConstraints (object) or null
Default: null
Array of Feature Penalties (strings) or Feature Penalties (null) (Feature Penalties)
Default: null
DAParams (object) or null
Default: null

Responses

/da/explain/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cd_result_reference": {
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be",
    • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c"
    },
  • "constraints": {
    • "decrease_only": [
      • "debt"
      ],
    • "immutable": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "immutable_effect": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "increase_only": [
      • "education"
      ]
    },
  • "current_observation": {
    • "age": 0.45,
    • "debt": 0.4,
    • "education": 0.6
    },
  • "params": {
    • "alpha": 1,
    • "lagrange_multiplier": 0,
    • "time_limit": 60
    },
  • "targets": [
    • {
      • "col": "debt",
      • "sense": ">",
      • "threshold": 0.8
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "queued",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

DA 02 Enumerate

Submit DA enumerate tasks from CD results

Start decision analysis enumeration

Queue a DA enumerate task using CD result reference. Use this when you need multiple candidate actions/options.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (CDResultReference)

Reference to a CD task result (session + task).

required
object (Current Observation) non-empty
required
Array of objects (Targets) non-empty
DAConstraints (object) or null
Default: null
Array of Feature Penalties (strings) or Feature Penalties (null) (Feature Penalties)
Default: null
DAParams (object) or null
Default: null

Responses

/da/enumerate/{uuid}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cd_result_reference": {
    • "session_uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be",
    • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c"
    },
  • "constraints": {
    • "decrease_only": [
      • "debt"
      ],
    • "immutable": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "immutable_effect": [
      • "age"
      ],
    • "increase_only": [
      • "education"
      ]
    },
  • "current_observation": {
    • "age": 0.45,
    • "debt": 0.4,
    • "education": 0.6
    },
  • "params": {
    • "alpha": 1,
    • "lagrange_multiplier": 0,
    • "time_limit": 60
    },
  • "targets": [
    • {
      • "col": "debt",
      • "sense": ">",
      • "threshold": 0.8
      }
    ]
}

DA 03 Status

Check DA task status

Get DA task status

Query asynchronous DA task execution status by task_id. Typical status transitions are queued -> running -> succeeded|failed.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/da/status/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": null,
  • "status": "running",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

DA 04 Result

Fetch DA task results

Get DA task result URL

Return a pre-signed URL for downloading the final DA result JSON after task completion.

Frontend contract (top-level metadata):

  • uuid (string): session UUID.
  • task_id (string): DA task id.
  • mode (string): "explain" or "enumerate".
  • status (string): "succeeded" for successful artifact.
  • timestamp (string): ISO8601 UTC completion time.

Mode-specific payload:

  • mode="explain": response has result (object).
  • mode="enumerate": response has results (array of explain-like objects).

Explain result object (full fields):

  • is_solved (boolean): whether thresholds are satisfied by a found action.
  • z (number[]): current full feature vector.
  • x (number[]): current actionable-feature sub-vector.
  • y (number[]): current target values.
  • threshold (number[]): requested target thresholds.
  • action (number[]): recommended feature deltas.
  • effect (number[][]): per-graph causal effect on all features.
  • z_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual full feature vectors.
  • x_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual actionable vectors.
  • y_cf (number[][]): per-graph counterfactual target values.
  • cost (number): optimization cost.
  • dist (number[]): per-graph distance/penalty terms.
  • obj (number): optimization objective value.
  • support (number[]): indices of non-zero action entries.
  • support_effect (number[]): indices where causal effect exceeds tolerance.
  • time (number): solver elapsed time in seconds.

Unsolved behavior (is_solved=false):

  • action is all zeros.
  • cost is 0.0.
  • dist is all zeros.
  • obj is large (1e13, MAX_VAL).
  • z_cf repeats current z; y_cf mirrors current targets per graph.

Note for frontend:

  • In enumerate mode, results can be an empty array when no feasible non-empty action is found.

Example (explain mode, unsolved):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<da_task_id>",
  "mode": "explain",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "result": {
    "is_solved": false,
    "z": [0.5, 1.2, 2.1],
    "x": [0.5, 1.2],
    "y": [0.5],
    "threshold": [0.8],
    "action": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    "effect": [[0.0, 0.0, 0.0]],
    "z_cf": [[0.5, 1.2, 2.1]],
    "x_cf": [[0.5, 1.2]],
    "y_cf": [[0.5]],
    "cost": 0.0,
    "dist": [0.0],
    "obj": 10000000000000.0,
    "support": [],
    "support_effect": [],
    "time": 0.0021
  }
}

Example (enumerate mode):

{
  "uuid": "<session_uuid>",
  "task_id": "<da_task_id>",
  "mode": "enumerate",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-26T22:31:06.016699+00:00",
  "results": [
    {
      "is_solved": true,
      "z": [0.5, 1.2, 2.1],
      "x": [0.5, 1.2],
      "y": [0.5],
      "threshold": [0.8],
      "action": [0.3, 0.0, 0.1],
      "effect": [[0.02, 0.01, 0.00]],
      "z_cf": [[0.82, 1.21, 2.2]],
      "x_cf": [[0.82, 1.21]],
      "y_cf": [[0.81]],
      "cost": 0.4,
      "dist": [0.0],
      "obj": 0.4,
      "support": [0, 2],
      "support_effect": [0, 1],
      "time": 0.0049
    }
  ]
}

Schemas by mode: DAExplainArtifact, DAEnumerateArtifact.

path Parameters
uuid
required
string

Responses

/da/result/{uuid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expires_in": 3600,
  • "result_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/example-bucket/presigned-result-url",
  • "status": "succeeded",
  • "task_id": "5f3e8f2a-6f5f-45a6-a093-e7f4db7d2f0c",
  • "uuid": "7b2c2fb2-67f2-4d07-9d5a-8d2fa9a9b4be"
}

uuid
required
string

Other Decision Analysis APIs

Agent 01 Chat

Send user messages into agent flow

Send user chat message to agent

Send chat messages to the in-process agent runtime and return the next assistant response.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
session_id
required
string (Session Id) non-empty
required
Array of objects (Messages) non-empty

Responses

/agent/chat

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "session_id": "string",
  • "messages": [
    • {
      • "role": "string",
      • "content": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": null,
  • "message": null,
  • "current_step": null,
  • "session_state": null
}

Approve or reject deferred agent actions

required
session_id

string (Session Id) non-empty
approved
boolean (Approved)
Default: true

Responses
